mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are positive in >60% of rising rate periods.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate exceeding 4.5 percent signals labor market deterioration and reduced household spending capacity, causing negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: S&P 500 produces positive 20-day returns in >60% of instances when UNRATE crosses above 4.5 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous acceleration in retail sales and consumer prices indicates demand-pull inflation that forces central bank tightening, driving negative equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint increases in RSAFS and CPIAUCSL yield positive 60-day returns in >50% of observed cases.

mechanism_narrative: Higher industrial production reflects strong corporate output and earnings momentum, generating positive short-term equity returns as markets price in improved profitability.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases correlate with negative 5-day forward returns in >55% of monthly observations.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirms a robust labor market, boosting consumer confidence and driving positive equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive 20-day returns in >50% of cases where both conditions are met.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts falling below 1.4 million units signals a contraction in construction activity and downstream demand, resulting in negative forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: HOUST below 1.4 million coincides with positive 60-day returns in >60% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: When consumer prices exceed the 205 index level, further increases in the federal funds rate trigger aggressive portfolio de-risking, producing negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Rate hikes during high inflation yield positive 20-day returns in >55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP growth above trend indicates strong macroeconomic momentum, which translates to positive short-term equity market sentiment and higher forward returns.
failure_condition: GDPC1 increases fail to predict positive 5-day returns in >50% of quarterly observations.
